description_long: This object is a stylized bottle with a rounded, bulbous body and a narrow neck, topped with a red cap. The bottle's main body is a deep brown color, suggesting it could represent a soft drink or soda, and it features a bright red label with white, angular markings or text on the front. The cap is also red and appears to be a screw-on type, slightly faceted for grip. The bottle has a simple, low-polygon design with flat surfaces and sharp edges, giving it a cartoonish or game-like appearance. There are no visible signs of wear, damage, or deformation on the exterior. The bottle is likely made of plastic, as indicated by its shape and finish, and is intended to be a personal beverage container.
description: A stylized, low-poly brown bottle with a red screw cap and a red label featuring white markings. The bottle has a cartoonish appearance and is free of visible damage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red label with white markings and the red screw cap; the bottle's face-like features are visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bottle's rounded shape and the cap, with the label partially visible and no markings shown.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown back of the bottle and the red cap, with no label details visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the edge of the label and the bottle's polygonal structure, with part of the white marking visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red label with white, angular markings or text on the front of the bottle.
